trials.supervisor_analysis: Trial 1 failed due to an infrastructure issue — the Docker container was paused ('Container amdpilot_sglang_19935 is paused, unpause the container before exec'). The agent never got to attempt the actual code fix. Retrying with explicit instructions.

Trial 3 failed due to an LLM provider error — the agent never executed any commands. The fix is well-defined: patch 4 call sites in aiter_backend.py. Providing explicit step-by-step instructions.

Trial 4 was killed (exit code 137) before the agent could make any changes — it only read the environment file and set up a todo list. The fix is well-defined and simple. Providing exact code patches so the agent can apply them immediately without needing to read/analyze files first.

Trial 5 made real progress — the agent applied the sed fix to all 4 mla_decode_fwd call sites but was killed (exit 137) before running the test harness. The changes may or may not have been persisted. Need to verify and re-apply if needed, then immediately run the test.
